title: Lazy Loading
description: A progressive image loading demonstration built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Implements the native loading="lazy" attribute alongside a CSS fade-from-black animation, causing images to smoothly appear only as they enter the viewport while scrolling. A key performance optimisation technique for modern web pages.

title: Open Waters Rafting Site
description: A multi-page rafting company website built with HTML and CSS. Features a responsive layout, styled navigation, and a contact form.

title: Product Review Form
description: A dynamic product review form built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Features star rating, real-time input feedback, and DOM manipulation.

title: Temple Album
description: A responsive image gallery showcasing LDS temples worldwide. Includes a hamburger navigation, lazy loading, and category filtering.

title: Paris Place Page
description: An information page about Paris built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Features a responsive layout and a wind chill calculator.

title: Devnest.Chima — Site Plan
description: A structured website planning document built with HTML and CSS. Covers site purpose, colour schema, and wireframes for the portfolio.
